en.title: Hypnotherapist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a hypnotherapist. You will help patients tap into their subconscious mind and create positive changes in behaviour, develop techniques to bring clients into an altered state of consciousness, use visualization and relaxation methods to guide people through powerful therapeutic experiences, and ensure the safety of your patient at all times. My first suggestion request is [issue to address]
en.remark: Provide hypnotherapy treatment plans for patients.

metaDescription: Unlock subconscious? Access altered states via visualization. Guide patients through therapeutic experiences for positive behavioral change.

faq.a: No. Real hypnosis needs voice, pacing, and rhythm coordination, which text can't provide. Its "hypnosis script" can serve as a self-relaxation script: read it slowly or use TTS to reach a light relaxation state. It's not clinical hypnosis.

faq.q: Is this prompt safe for severe anxiety or trauma?
faq.a: Not safe. Hypnotherapy involves subconscious activation and can trigger emotional responses or trauma flashbacks. For serious mental health concerns see a licensed clinical psychologist. AI "hypnosis" can hit pain points unexpectedly and worsen matters.
